summary: Comprehensive testing of FixPilot AI Mechanic Assistant completed. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. Fixed critical React bug (useState → useEffect). AI integration (GPT-5.2) fully functional.

issues: React Native deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - Low priority, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Line 39 in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx - Changed useState(() => { fetchRecent(); }) to useEffect(() => { fetchRecent(); }, [fetchRecent]) to fix React state update warning
FIXED: Added missing useEffect import to /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx
seed_data_creation: Test diagnoses created during testing with TEST_ prefix for easy identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs fully functional with AI integration. Frontend UI working correctly with proper navigation and data flow. Fixed React hook usage bug. App is production-ready.

backend_tests.delete_diagnosis: PASS - Deletes and returns 404 on subsequent GET
backend_tests.save_vehicle: PASS - Creates vehicle with all fields

frontend_tests.tab_navigation: PASS - Home, Diagnose, History tabs all work
frontend_tests.vehicle_form_submission: PASS - Form submits and navigates to results

frontend_tests.repair_library_match: PASS - Radiator leak matched correctly with tools, parts, videos
frontend_tests.chat_interface: PASS - Messages send, AI responds, repair match cards display
frontend_tests.chat_followup: PASS - Conversation context maintained across messages
frontend_tests.history_list: PASS - Shows past diagnoses with vehicle info and dates
frontend_tests.history_navigation: PASS - Clicking history item opens results page

ai_integration_status.diagnosis_endpoint: Working - AI analysis returns structured JSON
ai_integration_status.error_handling: Proper fallback for JSON parsing errors
